steps.t: Baradal has asked you to gather information from the villagers in Arhaim. You should attempt to talk to the villagers.
One of the villagers suggested that you speak to Arhaim's chieftain for information. You should talk to Garsind.
Baradal can be found in Arhaim, the woodmen village in Duskenvale. You should tell Baradal that the woodmen need to be convinced of your trustworthine…
Garsind can be found in Arhaim, the woodmen village in Duskenvale. You should talk to Garsind.
Garsind has told you of Shathur-munzu, the dwarf ruin to the west, and of the monster known as the Shadow Hunter. You should relay this information to…
